results.rendered_html:
stimita a. [stim-kartari kta]
1 Wet, moist.
2 (a) Still, unruffled, calm; kṣubhitamutkalikātaralaṃ manaḥ paya iva stimitasya mahodadheḥ  Māl. 3. 10.  (b) Fixed, rigid, unmoved, motionless, steady; vācaspatiḥ sannapi so'ṣṭamūrtau tvāśāsyaciṃtāstimito babhūva  Ku. 7. 87 ; 2. 59 ; stimitavikasitānāṃ  Māl. 1. 27 ;  R. 2. 22 , 3. 17 , 13. 48 , 79 ;  U. 6. 25. 
3 Closed, shut;  R. 1. 73. 
4 Benumbed, paralysed.
5 Soft, tender.
6 Gratified, satisfied.
— taṃ
1 Moisture
2 Fixity, steadiness.
Comp.
— vāyuḥ still air.
— samādhiḥ steady contemplation.
